The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Flickering Anomaly

Vines creep seeking life.
Fluids birth defying forms.
Silence weighs with intent.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • SESWSESEESWWSWSSSENNEESSEENNWNNESEEEESSUNNWNENWWWWWNENNEEENWWWNEEEESUNWSWSSES
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
